overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian industrial district at dusk. The player moves from a dirt wasteland past a cooling tower, along a palm-lined boulevard, and turns onto a street with large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial wasteland with nuclear cooling tower

events.description: flying AV enters the sky from the right and moves overhead
ground surface transitions from dirt to paved asphalt

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial wasteland toward the city street

notable_agents.action: flying AV cruising overhead from right to left

entered.detail: large industrial cooling tower with red warning lights on top
scattered trash and debris on dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dystopian industrial wasteland at dusk, with a massive cooling tower dominating the left side. The ground is covered in dirt and debris. A flying vehicle enters the sky from the right, cruising overhead as the camera walks forward. The scene transitions from dirt to paved ground toward the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved boulevard with palm trees approaching intersection

events.description: continuing straight along the palm-lined boulevard
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crossing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved boulevard toward the intersection, passing palm trees on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
car driving along the road parallel to the camera

entered.detail: row of palm trees lining the right side of the street
tall street lights illuminating the road
traffic signal at the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a paved boulevard lined with palm trees on the right, approaching an urban intersection. Pedestrians walk toward the camera and vehicles pass by on the road. The elevated highway remains visible on the left while the mega tower looms larger in the center.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with large digital billboards on concrete retaining wall

events.description: camera turns right at the intersection
car passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and proceeding along the street with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past the camera on the right
pedestrian walking in the same direction on the left sidewalk

entered.detail: sloped concrete wall supporting the building above
series of large glowing red digital billboards mounted on the wall
large industrial structure with neon signage

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the camera proceeds along a street featuring a massive concrete retaining wall covered in bright red digital billboards. The cooling tower and mega tower are no longer visible. Vehicles pass by on the road and pedestrians walk along the sidewalk in this neon-lit urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate industrial wasteland into a neon-lit urban corridor at dusk. It begins on a debris-strewn dirt path dominated by a massive cooling tower on the left, with a flying vehicle cruising overhead as the camera advances. As the terrain shifts from dirt to pavement, the scene opens into a boulevard lined with palm trees and bustling with pedestrians and traffic beneath a looming mega tower. The camera then turns right at an intersection, leaving the industrial structures behind to enter a dense city street. Finally, the environment transforms into a vibrant corridor defined by a massive concrete retaining wall covered in glowing red digital billboards.
